final_prompt.prompt:
Create a movie poster for "A Chinese Odyssey" reinterpreted in 1990s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: must include 35mm film grain texture, needs a 1990s Hong Kong cinema aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must feature Zhi Zunbao and Zixia in an embrace/kiss at the city wall as central focus, with Bull Demon King and Tang Monk standing in the distance
Subject: must include Zhi Zunbao and Zixia (the central couple), Bull Demon King, and Tang Monk
Scene/backdrop: must include the iconic city wall from the film
Lighting/mood: needs a romantic yet dramatic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a 1990s Hong Kong cinema color direction — exact grading is yours
Materials/textures: must include film grain texture
Text (verbatim): must include "大话西游"
Constraints: must preserve the iconic wall scene composition, all four characters must be present
Avoid:
